raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What’s on your mind","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Lin?","description":"Safe opener that lets Lin set the context before the conversation narrows.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Late nights pattern","name":"I noticed you’ve been working late for about three weeks — what’s driving that now?","description":"Checks whether the late stretch is a temporary push or a pattern without sounding accusatory.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-launch load","name":"Now that those launches are done, what is still keeping your load high?","description":"Surfaces hidden work, carryover obligations, or self-imposed pressure after major delivery.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Own vs delegate","name":"What work do you think only you should hold onto right now?","description":"Tests where Lin’s unique ownership really is versus where delegation could relieve pressure.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Delegation drag","name":"What’s making delegation harder than it should be on your team?","description":"Gets at trust, decision rights, or team shape issues that can quietly keep a senior leader overloaded.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision bottlenecks","name":"Where are decisions still landing back on you that probably shouldn’t?","description":"Surfaces structural overload and whether Lin is the bottleneck for reasons that can be changed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"What needs air cover","name":"What would you want more air cover on from me right now?","description":"Finds the manager support that would help pace normalize without adding vague support talk.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks steadier","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?","description":"Ends by converting the conversation into a concrete ask or adjustment without opening a new thread.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
